case_title: JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC VS. MEHDI MIRZA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MIRZA, MEHDI DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST RYAN E. VOS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-13-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-27-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100035772), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC SERVED JUL-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIRZA, MEHDI

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-22-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-10-2020 AT 10:30 AM PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200001679) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 200001679) FILED BY ATTORNEY VOS, RYAN E.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Richard D. McKie, Esq. Appearing for defendant. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed by plaintiff, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-10-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Continued To Jan-28-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Gayle Gutekunst, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jan-28-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Continued To Oct-22-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-22-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
